messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'onChange'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'onChange' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [apiKey, apiSecret, zipCode, defaultWeight, estimatedDays, freeShippingMinAmount, sandbox, onChange]

fix.text: [apiKey, apiSecret, zipCode, defaultWeight, estimatedDays, freeShippingMinAmount, sandbox, onChange]

source:
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Shield, MapPin, Package, Clock, DollarSign, Info } from 'lucide-react'; interface MandaBemConfigProps { config: any; onChange: (newConfig: any) => void; } export function MandaBemConfig({ config, onChange }: MandaBemConfigProps) { const [apiKey, setApiKey] = useState(config.apiKey || ''); const [apiSecret, setApiSecret] = useState(config.apiSecret || ''); const [zipCode, setZipCode] = useState(config.zipCode || ''); const [defaultWeight, setDefaultWeight] = useState(config.defaultWeight || ''); const [estimatedDays, setEstimatedDays] = useState(config.estimatedDays || ''); const [freeShippingMinAmount, setFreeShippingMinAmount] = useState(config.freeShippingMinAmount || ''); const [sandbox, setSandbox] = useState(config.sandbox ?? true); useEffect(() => { onChange({ apiKey, apiSecret, zipCode, defaultWeight: defaultWeight ? parseFloat(defaultWeight) : undefined, estimatedDays: estimatedDays ? parseInt(estimatedDays) : undefined, freeShippingMinAmount: freeShippingMinAmount ? parseFloat(freeShippingMinAmount) : undefined, sandbox, }); }, [apiKey, apiSecret, zipCode, defaultWeight, estimatedDays, freeShippingMinAmount, sandbox]); return (
{/* Credenciais */}

Credenciais da API

Insira as credenciais fornecidas pelo Manda Bem para conectar sua loja.

setApiKey(e.target.value)} className="w-full border p-3 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all" placeholder="Insira sua chave de API" />
setApiSecret(e.target.value)} className="w-full border p-3 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all" placeholder="Insira seu segredo de API" />

Você encontra suas credenciais no painel do Manda Bem em Configurações → Integrações.

{/* Origem e Entrega */}

Origem e Entrega

setZipCode(e.target.value)} className="w-full border p-3 pl-10 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all" placeholder="00000-000" maxLength={9} />
setDefaultWeight(e.target.value)} className="w-full border p-3 pl-10 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all" placeholder="0.5" />
setEstimatedDays(e.target.value)} className="w-full border p-3 pl-10 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all" placeholder="0" />
{/* Frete Grátis e Ambiente */}

Frete Grátis e Ambiente

setFreeShippingMinAmount(e.target.value)} className="w-full border p-3 pl-10 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all" placeholder="Deixe vazio para desativar" />

Pedidos acima deste valor terão frete grátis. Deixe vazio para não oferecer.

Use "Teste" para simular cotações sem custo real.

); }
